column1: # Pinned tool versions across the fleet — the review registry for `make doctor`.
# This file does NOT drive anything. Nothing is installed, upgraded, or asserted from it. It answers
# one question a human reliably forgets: "when did I last think about this pin?" The bump itself
# stays a decision — auto-bumping Litestream would change what replicates your only backups, and
# auto-bumping Rails would change what boots in production.
# After reviewing a pin (whether or not you changed it), update its reviewed date. A review that
# concluded "stay put" is still a review.
#   where     path:line (relative to the workspace root) — doctor reports drift if it can't find it
#   upstream  github owner/repo for a best-effort latest-release check, or "-" to skip
#   reviewed  YYYY-MM-DD, the last time a human looked
